SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA((SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA WHERE rdf_id IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS backup_option);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(1) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH g WHERE g.graph_id IN (SELECT graph_id FROM DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(0) WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH) > 0;
SELECT g.graph_id, DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(1) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH g JOIN DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA m ON g.graph_id = m.graph_id WHERE m.metadata_attribute IS NOT NULL;

SELECT g.graph_id, DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH g LEFT JOIN DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA m ON g.graph_id = m.graph_id;
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA(graph_id, metadata) VALUES (1, 'example_metadata'); SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_BACKUP_METADATA(1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DB.DBA.RDF_METADATA WHERE graph_id = 1);
